result.summary: Mapped PostHog’s public developer integration surfaces: 1 HTTP API, 1 MCP server, and 2 CLIs; confirmed personal API key auth for the HTTP API, identified the MCP endpoint and install CLIs, but CLI/MCP auth mechanics are only partially documented in the surfaced pages.

posthog_personal_api_key.label: Personal API key
posthog_personal_api_key.setup: In the PostHog app, create a personal API key from the API key management flow described in [Personal API keys](https://posthog.com/docs/api/personal-api-keys). The docs and [llms.txt](https://posthog.com/llms.txt) state that API access uses a personal API key, not a project API key.

variables.name: region
variables.resolveFrom: Choose the correct regional host; llms.txt says US cloud uses `https://us.i.posthog.com` and EU cloud uses `https://eu.i.posthog.com`.
